# arclo — Full API Reference

> AI-native design system for React. 20 components that don't exist in MUI, Tailwind, Radix, or shadcn/ui.

Built on Radix conventions. Works with shadcn/ui. TypeScript + Tailwind CSS. 6 color themes. Light + dark mode.

---

## Install

```
npm install @arc-lo/ui
```

Peer dependencies: react >=18, react-dom >=18, tailwindcss >=4

## Setup

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@arc-lo/ui/styles.css";
```

That's it — theme variables, dark mode, and Tailwind utility scanning are all included.

---

## Theming

6 built-in color themes: noir (default/black), violet, ocean, forest, sunset, rose.

Set via data attribute on html:

```html
<html data-theme="violet">
```

### CSS Custom Properties

Override any variable to create a custom theme:

```css
:root {
  --arclo-accent: #6C5CE7;
  --arclo-accent-fg: #ffffff;
  --arclo-accent-hover: #5A4BD1;
  --arclo-accent-bright: #8B7CF7;
  --arclo-surface: #ffffff;
  --arclo-surface-secondary: #f9fafb;
  --arclo-border: #e5e7eb;
  --arclo-text: #1a1a1a;
  --arclo-text-secondary: #6b7280;
  --arclo-text-muted: #9ca3af;
  --arclo-error: #ef4444;
  --arclo-error-surface: #fef2f2;
  --arclo-warning: #f59e0b;
  --arclo-warning-surface: #fffbeb;
  --arclo-radius: 0.5rem;
  --arclo-hover-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
}
```

### Dark Mode

Add `.dark` class to html element, or rely on automatic `prefers-color-scheme: dark` media query.

```html
<html class="dark" data-theme="violet">
```

---

## Architecture

All compound components follow Radix patterns:

- Root provides context via React Context
- Child parts consume context and render conditionally based on state
- All parts accept className for Tailwind customization
- All parts forward refs
- data-state attributes on Root for CSS targeting
- All colors use CSS custom properties (--arclo-*) — theme-aware for light/dark

---

## Components

All imports are from `@arc-lo/ui`.

---

### StreamingText

Token-by-token text rendering with 6 lifecycle states. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { StreamingText, useStreamingText } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| StreamingText.Root | Provider. Manages streaming state and animation. |
| StreamingText.Content | Renders the streamed text. |
| StreamingText.Cursor | Blinking cursor shown during streaming. |
| StreamingText.Skeleton | Loading placeholder shown in pending state. |
| StreamingText.ErrorFallback | Error display shown in error state. |
| StreamingText.RateLimit | Rate limit display shown in ratelimit state. |
| StreamingText.Toolbar | Action bar, shown conditionally by state. |
| StreamingText.Stop | Button to interrupt streaming. |

#### Props — StreamingText.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| stream | ReadableStream<string> | — | Readable stream source |
| text | string | — | Static text to animate (alternative to stream) |
| speed | number | 30 | Milliseconds between chunks |
| chunkSize | "char" \| "word" \| "line" | "char" | Size of each rendered chunk |
| onDone | () => void | — | Called when streaming completes |
| onError | (error: Error) => void | — | Called on stream error |
| onInterrupt | () => void | — | Called when user stops streaming |

#### Props — StreamingText.Content

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| render | (text: string) => ReactNode | — | Custom render function for displayed text |

#### Props — StreamingText.Cursor

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| char | string | "&#9612;" | Cursor character |

#### Props — StreamingText.Skeleton

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| lines | number | 3 | Number of skeleton lines |

#### Props — StreamingText.ErrorFallback

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| message | string | — | Error message to display |
| onRetry | () => void | — | Retry callback |

#### Props — StreamingText.RateLimit

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| retryAfter | number | — | Seconds until retry is allowed |
| message | string | — | Custom rate limit message |

#### Props — StreamingText.Toolbar

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| showIn | StreamingState[] | — | States in which toolbar is visible |

#### States

`StreamingState = "pending" | "streaming" | "done" | "interrupted" | "error" | "ratelimit"`

#### Hook — useStreamingText

```tsx
const { displayedText, fullText, state, interrupt, reset, skipAnimation } =
  useStreamingText({ text, speed, chunkSize, onDone });
```

| Return | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| displayedText | string | Currently visible text |
| fullText | string | Complete text received so far |
| state | StreamingState | Current lifecycle state |
| interrupt | () => void | Stop streaming |
| reset | () => void | Reset to pending state |
| skipAnimation | () => void | Jump to showing full text |

#### Full Example

```tsx
<StreamingText.Root text={response} speed={20} chunkSize="word" onDone={() => setDone(true)}>
  <StreamingText.Skeleton lines={3} />
  <StreamingText.Content />
  <StreamingText.Cursor char="|" />
  <StreamingText.Stop />
  <StreamingText.ErrorFallback message="Something went wrong." onRetry={() => retry()} />
  <StreamingText.RateLimit retryAfter={30} message="Rate limited. Please wait." />
  <StreamingText.Toolbar showIn={["done", "interrupted"]}>
    <button>Copy</button>
  </StreamingText.Toolbar>
</StreamingText.Root>
```

---

### PromptBox

AI prompt input with auto-growing textarea, context chips, and suggestions. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { PromptBox } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| PromptBox.Root | Provider. Manages value and submission state. |
| PromptBox.Chips | Container for context chips above the input. |
| PromptBox.Chip | Individual removable chip. |
| PromptBox.Input | Auto-growing textarea. |
| PromptBox.Footer | Bottom bar for submit button and extras. |
| PromptBox.SubmitButton | Submit trigger with loading state. |
| PromptBox.Suggestions | Suggestion pills below the input. |

#### Props — PromptBox.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| value | string | — | Controlled input value |
| defaultValue | string | — | Uncontrolled initial value |
| onSubmit | (value: string) => void | — | Called on submit (Enter key or button) |
| onValueChange | (value: string) => void | — | Called when input value changes |
| isSubmitting | boolean | false | Shows loading state, disables input |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disables the entire prompt box |

#### Props — PromptBox.Chip

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| onRemove | () => void | — | Called when chip remove button is clicked |

#### Props — PromptBox.Input

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| minRows | number | 1 | Minimum textarea rows |
| maxRows | number | 8 | Maximum textarea rows before scrolling |

#### Props — PromptBox.SubmitButton

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | "default" \| "icon" \| "icon-text" | "default" | Button style variant |
| loadingLabel | string | — | Label shown during isSubmitting |

#### Props — PromptBox.Suggestions

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| suggestions | string[] | — | List of suggestion strings |
| onSelect | (suggestion: string) => void | — | Called when a suggestion is clicked |

#### Behavior

- Enter submits, Shift+Enter adds newline
- Textarea auto-grows between minRows and maxRows

#### Full Example

```tsx
<PromptBox.Root
  value={input}
  onValueChange={setInput}
  onSubmit={(value) => sendMessage(value)}
  isSubmitting={loading}
>
  <PromptBox.Chips>
    <PromptBox.Chip onRemove={() => removeModel()}>Claude Sonnet</PromptBox.Chip>
    <PromptBox.Chip onRemove={() => removeFile()}>report.pdf</PromptBox.Chip>
  </PromptBox.Chips>
  <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Ask anything..." minRows={2} maxRows={6} />
  <PromptBox.Suggestions
    suggestions={["Summarize this document", "Explain the key findings", "Write a follow-up"]}
    onSelect={(s) => setInput(s)}
  />
  <PromptBox.Footer>
    <span className="text-xs text-[var(--arclo-text-muted)]">Shift+Enter for newline</span>
    <PromptBox.SubmitButton variant="icon-text" loadingLabel="Sending..." />
  </PromptBox.Footer>
</PromptBox.Root>
```

---

### ConfidenceBadge

Visual indicator for AI confidence levels. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ConfidenceBadge } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| level | "high" \| "medium" \| "low" \| "unknown" | — | Required. Confidence level |
| variant | "badge" \| "dot" \| "inline" | "badge" | Display variant |
| label | string | — | Custom label (overrides default level label) |

#### Examples

```tsx
<ConfidenceBadge level="high" />
<ConfidenceBadge level="medium" variant="dot" />
<ConfidenceBadge level="low" variant="inline" label="Low certainty" />
<ConfidenceBadge level="unknown" variant="badge" />
```

---

### FeedbackBar

Response action toolbar with thumbs up/down, copy, and regenerate. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { FeedbackBar } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| FeedbackBar.Root | Provider. Manages feedback state. |
| FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp | Thumbs up button. Toggleable. |
| FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown | Thumbs down button. Toggleable. |
| FeedbackBar.Copy | Copy-to-clipboard button. |
| FeedbackBar.Regenerate | Regenerate response button. |

#### Props — FeedbackBar.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| onFeedback | (value: "up" \| "down" \| null) => void | — | Called when feedback changes. null = deselected. |

#### Props — FeedbackBar.Copy

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| text | string | — | Text to copy to clipboard |

#### Props — FeedbackBar.Regenerate

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| onRegenerate | () => void | — | Called when regenerate is clicked |

#### Full Example

```tsx
<FeedbackBar.Root onFeedback={(value) => trackFeedback(messageId, value)}>
  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp />
  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown />
  <FeedbackBar.Copy text={message.content} />
  <FeedbackBar.Regenerate onRegenerate={() => regenerate(messageId)} />
</FeedbackBar.Root>
```

---

### CitationInline

Inline source attribution with hover preview. Simple component with grouping wrapper.

#### Import

```tsx
import { CitationInline, CitationGroup } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props — CitationInline

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| index | number | — | Required. Citation number |
| href | string | — | Link URL for the source |
| sourceTitle | string | — | Title of the source |
| preview | ReactNode | — | Content shown on hover |
| variant | "superscript" \| "bracket" \| "pill" | "superscript" | Display style |

#### CitationGroup

Wraps multiple CitationInline components for compact display.

#### Examples

```tsx
{/* Single citation */}
<p>
  The transformer architecture revolutionized NLP
  <CitationInline
    index={1}
    href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762"
    sourceTitle="Attention Is All You Need"
    preview="We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer..."
  />
</p>

{/* Grouped citations */}
<p>
  Multiple studies confirm this finding
  <CitationGroup>
    <CitationInline index={1} href="/source/1" sourceTitle="Study A" />
    <CitationInline index={2} href="/source/2" sourceTitle="Study B" />
    <CitationInline index={3} href="/source/3" sourceTitle="Study C" />
  </CitationGroup>
</p>

{/* Variant styles */}
<CitationInline index={1} variant="superscript" />  {/* renders as superscript number */}
<CitationInline index={2} variant="bracket" />      {/* renders as [2] */}
<CitationInline index={3} variant="pill" />          {/* renders as rounded pill */}
```

---

### RefusalCard

Graceful declined request handling with alternative suggestions. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { RefusalCard } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| reason | string | — | Why the request was declined |
| type | "safety" \| "capability" \| "policy" \| "context" | — | Refusal category (sets color) |
| suggestions | string[] | — | Alternative prompts to offer |
| onSuggestionClick | (suggestion: string) => void | — | Called when user clicks a suggestion |
| icon | ReactNode | — | Custom icon (default per type) |

#### Type Colors

- safety: red
- capability: amber
- policy: orange
- context: blue

#### Full Example

```tsx
<RefusalCard
  type="safety"
  reason="I'm not able to help with that request as it involves generating harmful content."
  suggestions={[
    "Can you help me write a fictional story instead?",
    "What are some creative writing tips?",
    "Help me brainstorm story ideas"
  ]}
  onSuggestionClick={(suggestion) => submitPrompt(suggestion)}
/>

<RefusalCard
  type="capability"
  reason="I don't have access to real-time data."
  suggestions={["What data do you have access to?"]}
  onSuggestionClick={submitPrompt}
/>
```

---

### ThinkingBlock

Collapsible chain-of-thought reasoning display. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ThinkingBlock } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| ThinkingBlock.Root | Provider. Manages open/closed and thinking state. |
| ThinkingBlock.Trigger | Clickable header to expand/collapse. |
| ThinkingBlock.Content | Collapsible content area. |

#### Props — ThinkingBlock.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| state | "thinking" \| "done" \| "error" | — | Current thinking state |
| defaultOpen | boolean | true | Initial open state |
| collapseOnDone | boolean | true | Auto-collapse when state becomes "done" |
| duration | number | — | Seconds spent thinking (displayed in done state) |

#### Props — ThinkingBlock.Trigger

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | — | Custom trigger label |

#### Full Example

```tsx
<ThinkingBlock.Root state={thinkingState} duration={elapsed} collapseOnDone defaultOpen>
  <ThinkingBlock.Trigger label="Chain of thought" />
  <ThinkingBlock.Content>
    <p>Step 1: Analyzing the user's question about quantum computing...</p>
    <p>Step 2: Considering relevant research papers...</p>
    <p>Step 3: Formulating a comprehensive answer...</p>
  </ThinkingBlock.Content>
</ThinkingBlock.Root>
```

---

### ToolCall

Tool invocation display with status, inputs, and outputs. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ToolCall } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| ToolCall.Root | Provider. Manages tool status and display. |
| ToolCall.Header | Shows tool name and status icon. |
| ToolCall.Input | Collapsible section for tool input parameters. |
| ToolCall.Output | Collapsible section for tool output/result. |

#### Props — ToolCall.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| toolName | string | — | Required. Name of the tool |
| status | "pending" \| "running" \| "success" \| "error" | — | Current execution status |
| defaultOpen | boolean | false | Initial open state for input/output sections |

#### Props — ToolCall.Input

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | "Input" | Section label |

#### Props — ToolCall.Output

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | "Output" | Section label |

#### Full Example

```tsx
<ToolCall.Root toolName="search_web" status="success" defaultOpen>
  <ToolCall.Header />
  <ToolCall.Input label="Query">
    {JSON.stringify({ query: "latest AI research papers 2025", limit: 5 }, null, 2)}
  </ToolCall.Input>
  <ToolCall.Output label="Results">
    {JSON.stringify({ results: [{ title: "Paper 1", url: "..." }] }, null, 2)}
  </ToolCall.Output>
</ToolCall.Root>

<ToolCall.Root toolName="execute_code" status="running">
  <ToolCall.Header />
  <ToolCall.Input>
    {`console.log("Hello, world!");`}
  </ToolCall.Input>
</ToolCall.Root>

<ToolCall.Root toolName="read_file" status="error">
  <ToolCall.Header />
  <ToolCall.Output label="Error">File not found: /data/input.csv</ToolCall.Output>
</ToolCall.Root>
```

---

### MarkdownRenderer

Streaming-aware markdown rendering. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { MarkdownRenderer } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| content | string | — | Markdown string to render |
| renderCode | (code: string, lang?: string) => ReactNode | — | Custom code block renderer |

Supports: headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks, inline code, links, blockquotes, bold, italic, tables.

#### Examples

```tsx
{/* Basic usage */}
<MarkdownRenderer content={assistantMessage} />

{/* With custom code block renderer */}
<MarkdownRenderer
  content={response}
  renderCode={(code, lang) => (
    <CodeBlock code={code} language={lang} showLineNumbers />
  )}
/>
```

---

### StatusIndicator

Animated AI status label with letter-by-letter light sweep animation. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { StatusIndicator } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| state | "idle" \| "thinking" \| "streaming" \| "tool-calling" \| "error" | — | Current AI state |
| label | string | — | Custom label (auto-generated from state if omitted) |
| icon | ReactNode | — | Custom icon |
| color | "purple" \| "amber" \| "blue" \| "red" \| "gray" | — | Override indicator color |
| animation | "pulse" \| "sweep" | "sweep" | Animation style |

#### Examples

```tsx
<StatusIndicator state="idle" />
<StatusIndicator state="thinking" />
<StatusIndicator state="streaming" label="Writing response..." />
<StatusIndicator state="tool-calling" label="Searching the web..." />
<StatusIndicator state="error" label="Something went wrong" />
<StatusIndicator state="thinking" animation="pulse" color="blue" />
```

---

### TokenUsage

Visual token consumption and cost meter. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { TokenUsage } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| inputTokens | number | — | Required. Number of input tokens used |
| outputTokens | number | — | Required. Number of output tokens used |
| maxTokens | number | — | Required. Maximum token limit |
| cost | number | — | Dollar cost of the request |

#### Examples

```tsx
<TokenUsage
  inputTokens={1500}
  outputTokens={800}
  maxTokens={4096}
/>

<TokenUsage
  inputTokens={12000}
  outputTokens={4500}
  maxTokens={128000}
  cost={0.0345}
/>
```

---

### ModelSelector

Dropdown selector for AI models. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ModelSelector } from "@arc-lo/ui";
import type { ModelOption } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| models | ModelOption[] | — | Required. Available models |
| value | string | — | Required. Currently selected model ID |
| onChange | (modelId: string) => void | — | Required. Called when selection changes |

#### ModelOption Type

```tsx
type ModelOption = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string;
  badge?: string;
};
```

#### Full Example

```tsx
const models: ModelOption[] = [
  { id: "claude-sonnet", name: "Claude Sonnet", description: "Fast and capable", badge: "Fast" },
  { id: "claude-opus", name: "Claude Opus", description: "Most powerful", badge: "New" },
  { id: "claude-haiku", name: "Claude Haiku", description: "Fastest responses" },
];

<ModelSelector
  models={models}
  value={selectedModel}
  onChange={setSelectedModel}
/>
```

---

### SourceCard

RAG retrieval result card with relevance scoring. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { SourceCard } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| title | string | — | Required. Source document title |
| url | string | — | Link to the source |
| content | string | — | Required. Snippet or summary text |
| relevance | number | — | Required. Relevance score from 0 to 1 |
| variant | "compact" \| "full" | — | Display variant |

#### Examples

```tsx
<SourceCard
  title="Attention Is All You Need"
  url="https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762"
  content="We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely."
  relevance={0.95}
/>

<SourceCard
  title="React Documentation"
  url="https://react.dev"
  content="React lets you build user interfaces out of individual pieces called components."
  relevance={0.72}
  variant="compact"
/>
```

---

### ChatThread

Conversation container with user, assistant, and system messages. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ChatThread } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| ChatThread.Root | Scrollable container for the conversation. |
| ChatThread.Messages | Wrapper for message list. |
| ChatThread.Message | Generic message (requires role prop). |
| ChatThread.UserMessage | Pre-styled user message bubble. |
| ChatThread.AssistantMessage | Pre-styled assistant message bubble. |
| ChatThread.SystemMessage | Pre-styled system/info message. |
| ChatThread.ScrollAnchor | Auto-scroll anchor placed at end of messages. |

#### Props — ChatThread.Message / UserMessage / AssistantMessage

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| role | "user" \| "assistant" \| "system" | — | Message role (for generic Message) |
| avatar | ReactNode | — | Avatar element or object |
| name | string | — | Display name |
| timestamp | string \| Date | — | Message timestamp |

#### Avatar Object

When passing an avatar object instead of ReactNode:

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| src | string | — | Image URL |
| initials | string | — | Fallback initials |
| icon | ReactNode | — | Fallback icon |
| color | string | — | Background color |
| textColor | string | — | Text color for initials |
| size | number | 28 | Avatar size in pixels |

#### Full Example

```tsx
<ChatThread.Root className="h-[600px]">
  <ChatThread.Messages>
    <ChatThread.SystemMessage>
      You are chatting with an AI assistant.
    </ChatThread.SystemMessage>

    <ChatThread.UserMessage
      name="Alice"
      avatar={{ initials: "A", color: "#6C5CE7", textColor: "#fff" }}
      timestamp="2:30 PM"
    >
      What is the transformer architecture?
    </ChatThread.UserMessage>

    <ChatThread.AssistantMessage
      name="Claude"
      avatar={{ src: "/claude-avatar.png" }}
      timestamp="2:30 PM"
    >
      <StreamingText.Root text={response} speed={20}>
        <StreamingText.Content />
        <StreamingText.Cursor />
      </StreamingText.Root>
    </ChatThread.AssistantMessage>

    <ChatThread.ScrollAnchor />
  </ChatThread.Messages>
</ChatThread.Root>
```

---

### FileAttachment

File preview chips and cards with type icons and upload progress. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { FileAttachment } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| name | string | — | Required. File name |
| size | string | — | Human-readable file size (e.g., "2.4 MB") |
| type | "image" \| "pdf" \| "code" \| "text" \| "csv" \| "other" | — | File type (determines icon) |
| preview | ReactNode | — | Preview content (e.g., image thumbnail) |
| progress | number | — | Upload progress from 0 to 100 |
| onRemove | () => void | — | Called when remove button is clicked |
| variant | "chip" \| "card" | — | Display variant |

#### Examples

```tsx
{/* Chip variant (compact, inline) */}
<FileAttachment
  name="report.pdf"
  size="2.4 MB"
  type="pdf"
  onRemove={() => removeFile("report.pdf")}
  variant="chip"
/>

{/* Card variant (larger, with preview) */}
<FileAttachment
  name="screenshot.png"
  size="1.2 MB"
  type="image"
  preview={<img src="/thumb.png" alt="Preview" />}
  variant="card"
/>

{/* With upload progress */}
<FileAttachment
  name="data.csv"
  size="5.1 MB"
  type="csv"
  progress={45}
  onRemove={() => cancelUpload("data.csv")}
/>
```

---

### CodeBlock

Code display with copy button, line numbers, and language badge. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { CodeBlock } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| code | string | — | Required. Code string to display |
| language | string | — | Programming language (shown as badge, used for highlighting) |
| showLineNumbers | boolean | false | Show line numbers |
| maxHeight | string | "400px" | Max height before scrolling |
| onCopy | () => void | — | Called after code is copied |

#### Examples

```tsx
<CodeBlock
  code={`function hello() {\n  console.log("Hello, world!");\n}`}
  language="typescript"
  showLineNumbers
/>

<CodeBlock
  code={pythonCode}
  language="python"
  maxHeight="600px"
  onCopy={() => toast("Copied!")}
/>
```

---

### ConversationBranch

Branch navigation for regenerated responses. Simple component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ConversationBranch } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| current | number | — | Required. Current branch index (1-based) |
| total | number | — | Required. Total number of branches |
| onPrevious | () => void | — | Called when previous button is clicked |
| onNext | () => void | — | Called when next button is clicked |

#### Example

```tsx
<ConversationBranch
  current={2}
  total={3}
  onPrevious={() => setBranch(branch - 1)}
  onNext={() => setBranch(branch + 1)}
/>
```

---

### SuggestTopics

Starter prompt cards for empty chat states. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { SuggestTopics, TopicCard } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Props — SuggestTopics

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | "grid" \| "compact" | — | Layout variant |
| columns | 1 \| 2 \| 3 | — | Number of grid columns |

#### Props — TopicCard

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| title | string | — | Required. Topic title |
| description | string | — | Topic description |
| icon | ReactNode | — | Icon or emoji |
| onSelect | (title: string) => void | — | Called when card is clicked |
| variant | "card" \| "compact" | — | Display variant |

#### Examples

```tsx
{/* Grid layout */}
<SuggestTopics variant="grid" columns={2}>
  <TopicCard
    icon="✍️"
    title="Write a blog post"
    description="About AI design systems"
    onSelect={(title) => setPrompt(title)}
  />
  <TopicCard
    icon="🔍"
    title="Research a topic"
    description="Deep dive into any subject"
    onSelect={(title) => setPrompt(title)}
  />
  <TopicCard
    icon="💻"
    title="Debug my code"
    description="Paste code and get help"
    onSelect={(title) => setPrompt(title)}
  />
  <TopicCard
    icon="📊"
    title="Analyze data"
    description="Upload a CSV or describe your data"
    onSelect={(title) => setPrompt(title)}
  />
</SuggestTopics>

{/* Compact layout */}
<SuggestTopics variant="compact">
  <TopicCard variant="compact" icon="🔍" title="Search" onSelect={handle} />
  <TopicCard variant="compact" icon="✍️" title="Write" onSelect={handle} />
  <TopicCard variant="compact" icon="💡" title="Brainstorm" onSelect={handle} />
</SuggestTopics>
```

---

### ImageGen

Image generation with blur reveal, progress bar, and 5 lifecycle states. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { ImageGen } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| ImageGen.Root | Provider. Manages generation state and layout. |
| ImageGen.Placeholder | Shown in idle state. |
| ImageGen.Preview | Renders the generated image with optional blur reveal. |
| ImageGen.Progress | Progress bar during generation. |
| ImageGen.Overlay | Overlay label on image. |
| ImageGen.ErrorFallback | Error display. |
| ImageGen.Toolbar | Action bar for download/retry buttons. |
| ImageGen.Download | Download button. |
| ImageGen.Retry | Retry button. |

#### Props — ImageGen.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| state | ImageGenState | — | Required. Current generation state |
| src | string | — | Generated image URL |
| alt | string | — | Alt text for the image |
| aspectRatio | string | "1/1" | CSS aspect ratio |
| prompt | string | — | Generation prompt (for display) |
| onRetry | () => void | — | Retry callback |
| onDownload | () => void | — | Download callback |
| blurReveal | boolean | true | Animate blur-to-clear on done |

#### Props — ImageGen.Progress

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| progress | number | — | Progress percentage (0-100) |

#### Props — ImageGen.Overlay

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | — | Overlay label text |

#### Props — ImageGen.ErrorFallback

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| message | string | — | Error message |

#### States

`ImageGenState = "idle" | "pending" | "generating" | "done" | "error"`

#### Full Example

```tsx
<ImageGen.Root
  state={genState}
  src={imageUrl}
  alt="A serene mountain landscape at sunset"
  aspectRatio="16/9"
  prompt="A serene mountain landscape at sunset, digital art"
  blurReveal
  onRetry={() => regenerate()}
  onDownload={() => downloadImage(imageUrl)}
>
  <ImageGen.Placeholder />
  <ImageGen.Preview />
  <ImageGen.Progress progress={progress} />
  <ImageGen.Overlay label="Generating your image..." />
  <ImageGen.ErrorFallback message="Generation failed. Please try again." />
  <ImageGen.Toolbar>
    <ImageGen.Download />
    <ImageGen.Retry />
  </ImageGen.Toolbar>
</ImageGen.Root>
```

---

### VideoGen

Video generation with stages, progress, player, and 6 lifecycle states. Compound component.

#### Import

```tsx
import { VideoGen } from "@arc-lo/ui";
```

#### Parts

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| VideoGen.Root | Provider. Manages generation state and playback. |
| VideoGen.Placeholder | Shown in idle state. |
| VideoGen.Thumbnail | Poster image before playback. |
| VideoGen.Player | Video player element. |
| VideoGen.Progress | Progress bar during generation. |
| VideoGen.StageLabel | Label showing current generation stage. |
| VideoGen.PlayButton | Play button overlay on thumbnail. |
| VideoGen.ErrorFallback | Error display. |
| VideoGen.Toolbar | Action bar for controls. |

#### Props — VideoGen.Root

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| state | VideoGenState | — | Required. Current generation state |
| src | string | — | Generated video URL |
| poster | string | — | Poster/thumbnail image URL |
| progress | number | — | Generation progress (0-100) |
| aspectRatio | string | "16/9" | CSS aspect ratio |
| duration | number | — | Video duration in seconds |
| prompt | string | — | Generation prompt (for display) |
| onRetry | () => void | — | Retry callback |
| onDownload | () => void | — | Download callback |
| onPlay | () => void | — | Called when video plays |

#### Props — VideoGen.Player

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| autoPlay | boolean | — | Auto-play on done |
| loop | boolean | — | Loop playback |
| muted | boolean | — | Muted playback |

#### Props — VideoGen.StageLabel

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | string | — | Custom stage label |

#### Props — VideoGen.ErrorFallback

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| message | string | — | Error message |

#### States

`VideoGenState = "idle" | "queued" | "processing" | "rendering" | "done" | "error"`

#### Full Example

```tsx
<VideoGen.Root
  state={genState}
  src={videoUrl}
  poster={thumbnailUrl}
  progress={progress}
  aspectRatio="16/9"
  duration={15}
  prompt="A cat playing piano, cinematic"
  onRetry={() => regenerate()}
  onDownload={() => downloadVideo()}
  onPlay={() => trackPlay()}
>
  <VideoGen.Placeholder />
  <VideoGen.Thumbnail />
  <VideoGen.Player autoPlay={false} loop muted />
  <VideoGen.Progress />
  <VideoGen.StageLabel label="Rendering frames..." />
  <VideoGen.PlayButton />
  <VideoGen.ErrorFallback message="Video generation failed." />
  <VideoGen.Toolbar />
</VideoGen.Root>
```

---

## Full Application Examples

### Example 1: Simple Chatbot

A complete chatbot with streaming responses, feedback, and starter topics.

```tsx
import {
  ChatThread,
  StreamingText,
  PromptBox,
  FeedbackBar,
  SuggestTopics,
  TopicCard,
  StatusIndicator,
  useStreamingText,
} from "@arc-lo/ui";
import { useState } from "react";

function Chatbot() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState("");
  const [isStreaming, setIsStreaming] = useState(false);
  const [currentResponse, setCurrentResponse] = useState("");
  const [aiState, setAiState] = useState("idle");

  async function handleSubmit(value) {
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", content: value }]);
    setInput("");
    setIsStreaming(true);
    setAiState("thinking");

    const response = await fetch("/api/chat", {
      method: "POST",
      body: JSON.stringify({ message: value }),
    });

    setAiState("streaming");
    const text = await response.text();
    setCurrentResponse(text);
  }

  function handleDone() {
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "assistant", content: currentResponse }]);
    setCurrentResponse("");
    setIsStreaming(false);
    setAiState("idle");
  }

  const isEmpty = messages.length === 0 && !isStreaming;

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-screen max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      <StatusIndicator state={aiState} />

      <ChatThread.Root className="flex-1">
        <ChatThread.Messages>
          {isEmpty && (
            <SuggestTopics variant="grid" columns={2}>
              <TopicCard
                icon="✍️"
                title="Write a story"
                description="Creative fiction or non-fiction"
                onSelect={(title) => handleSubmit(title)}
              />
              <TopicCard
                icon="🔍"
                title="Research a topic"
                description="Deep dive into any subject"
                onSelect={(title) => handleSubmit(title)}
              />
              <TopicCard
                icon="💡"
                title="Brainstorm ideas"
                description="Generate creative solutions"
                onSelect={(title) => handleSubmit(title)}
              />
              <TopicCard
                icon="📝"
                title="Summarize text"
                description="Condense long documents"
                onSelect={(title) => handleSubmit(title)}
              />
            </SuggestTopics>
          )}

          {messages.map((msg, i) =>
            msg.role === "user" ? (
              <ChatThread.UserMessage key={i} name="You">
                {msg.content}
              </ChatThread.UserMessage>
            ) : (
              <ChatThread.AssistantMessage key={i} name="Claude">
                {msg.content}
                <FeedbackBar.Root onFeedback={(v) => trackFeedback(i, v)}>
                  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp />
                  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown />
                  <FeedbackBar.Copy text={msg.content} />
                  <FeedbackBar.Regenerate onRegenerate={() => regenerate(i)} />
                </FeedbackBar.Root>
              </ChatThread.AssistantMessage>
            )
          )}

          {isStreaming && (
            <ChatThread.AssistantMessage name="Claude">
              <StreamingText.Root text={currentResponse} speed={20} onDone={handleDone}>
                <StreamingText.Skeleton lines={3} />
                <StreamingText.Content />
                <StreamingText.Cursor />
                <StreamingText.Stop />
              </StreamingText.Root>
            </ChatThread.AssistantMessage>
          )}

          <ChatThread.ScrollAnchor />
        </ChatThread.Messages>
      </ChatThread.Root>

      <PromptBox.Root
        value={input}
        onValueChange={setInput}
        onSubmit={handleSubmit}
        isSubmitting={isStreaming}
      >
        <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Ask anything..." />
        <PromptBox.Footer>
          <PromptBox.SubmitButton />
        </PromptBox.Footer>
      </PromptBox.Root>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

### Example 2: RAG Assistant

A retrieval-augmented generation assistant with citations, source cards, and confidence indicators.

```tsx
import {
  ChatThread,
  StreamingText,
  PromptBox,
  CitationInline,
  CitationGroup,
  SourceCard,
  ConfidenceBadge,
  FeedbackBar,
} from "@arc-lo/ui";
import { useState } from "react";

function RAGAssistant() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const [sources, setSources] = useState([]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState("");
  const [isStreaming, setIsStreaming] = useState(false);

  async function handleSubmit(value) {
    setInput("");
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", content: value }]);
    setIsStreaming(true);

    const res = await fetch("/api/rag", {
      method: "POST",
      body: JSON.stringify({ query: value }),
    });
    const data = await res.json();

    setSources(data.sources);
    setMessages((prev) => [
      ...prev,
      {
        role: "assistant",
        content: data.answer,
        sources: data.sources,
        confidence: data.confidence,
      },
    ]);
    setIsStreaming(false);
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen max-w-4xl mx-auto">
      {/* Main chat */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        <ChatThread.Root className="flex-1">
          <ChatThread.Messages>
            {messages.map((msg, i) =>
              msg.role === "user" ? (
                <ChatThread.UserMessage key={i} name="You">
                  {msg.content}
                </ChatThread.UserMessage>
              ) : (
                <ChatThread.AssistantMessage key={i} name="Research Assistant">
                  <ConfidenceBadge level={msg.confidence} />

                  <p>
                    The transformer architecture introduced self-attention
                    <CitationInline
                      index={1}
                      href={msg.sources?.[0]?.url}
                      sourceTitle={msg.sources?.[0]?.title}
                      preview={msg.sources?.[0]?.content}
                    />
                    which replaced recurrent layers entirely
                    <CitationGroup>
                      <CitationInline index={2} sourceTitle={msg.sources?.[1]?.title} />
                      <CitationInline index={3} sourceTitle={msg.sources?.[2]?.title} />
                    </CitationGroup>
                  </p>

                  <FeedbackBar.Root onFeedback={(v) => trackFeedback(i, v)}>
                    <FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp />
                    <FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown />
                    <FeedbackBar.Copy text={msg.content} />
                  </FeedbackBar.Root>
                </ChatThread.AssistantMessage>
              )
            )}
            <ChatThread.ScrollAnchor />
          </ChatThread.Messages>
        </ChatThread.Root>

        <PromptBox.Root value={input} onValueChange={setInput} onSubmit={handleSubmit} isSubmitting={isStreaming}>
          <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Ask about your documents..." />
          <PromptBox.Footer>
            <PromptBox.SubmitButton />
          </PromptBox.Footer>
        </PromptBox.Root>
      </div>

      {/* Source panel */}
      <aside className="w-80 border-l border-[var(--arclo-border)] p-4 overflow-y-auto">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 text-[var(--arclo-text-secondary)]">Sources</h2>
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {sources.map((source, i) => (
            <SourceCard
              key={i}
              title={source.title}
              url={source.url}
              content={source.content}
              relevance={source.relevance}
              variant="compact"
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

### Example 3: Coding Agent

A coding assistant with thinking blocks, tool calls, code blocks, token usage, and model selection.

```tsx
import {
  ChatThread,
  StreamingText,
  PromptBox,
  ThinkingBlock,
  ToolCall,
  CodeBlock,
  TokenUsage,
  ModelSelector,
  StatusIndicator,
  FeedbackBar,
  FileAttachment,
  ConversationBranch,
} from "@arc-lo/ui";
import type { ModelOption } from "@arc-lo/ui";
import { useState } from "react";

const models: ModelOption[] = [
  { id: "claude-sonnet", name: "Claude Sonnet", description: "Fast and capable", badge: "Fast" },
  { id: "claude-opus", name: "Claude Opus", description: "Most powerful", badge: "Best" },
];

function CodingAgent() {
  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState("claude-sonnet");
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState("");
  const [aiState, setAiState] = useState("idle");
  const [tokenData, setTokenData] = useState(null);

  async function handleSubmit(value) {
    setInput("");
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", content: value }]);
    setAiState("thinking");

    const res = await fetch("/api/code-agent", {
      method: "POST",
      body: JSON.stringify({ message: value, model: selectedModel }),
    });
    const data = await res.json();

    setAiState("idle");
    setTokenData(data.usage);
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "assistant", ...data }]);
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-screen max-w-3xl mx-auto">
      <header className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-[var(--arclo-border)]">
        <ModelSelector models={models} value={selectedModel} onChange={setSelectedModel} />
        <StatusIndicator state={aiState} />
      </header>

      <ChatThread.Root className="flex-1">
        <ChatThread.Messages>
          {messages.map((msg, i) =>
            msg.role === "user" ? (
              <ChatThread.UserMessage key={i} name="Developer">
                {msg.content}
              </ChatThread.UserMessage>
            ) : (
              <ChatThread.AssistantMessage key={i} name="Coding Agent">
                {/* Thinking block */}
                {msg.thinking && (
                  <ThinkingBlock.Root state="done" duration={msg.thinkingDuration} collapseOnDone>
                    <ThinkingBlock.Trigger label="Reasoning" />
                    <ThinkingBlock.Content>{msg.thinking}</ThinkingBlock.Content>
                  </ThinkingBlock.Root>
                )}

                {/* Tool calls */}
                {msg.toolCalls?.map((tool, j) => (
                  <ToolCall.Root key={j} toolName={tool.name} status={tool.status} defaultOpen={tool.status === "error"}>
                    <ToolCall.Header />
                    <ToolCall.Input>{JSON.stringify(tool.input, null, 2)}</ToolCall.Input>
                    <ToolCall.Output>{JSON.stringify(tool.output, null, 2)}</ToolCall.Output>
                  </ToolCall.Root>
                ))}

                {/* Response with code */}
                <StreamingText.Root text={msg.content}>
                  <StreamingText.Content
                    render={(text) => (
                      <div>
                        <p>{text}</p>
                        {msg.code && (
                          <CodeBlock
                            code={msg.code}
                            language={msg.language}
                            showLineNumbers
                            onCopy={() => toast("Copied!")}
                          />
                        )}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  />
                </StreamingText.Root>

                {/* File attachments from tool results */}
                {msg.files?.map((file, j) => (
                  <FileAttachment key={j} name={file.name} type={file.type} size={file.size} variant="chip" />
                ))}

                {/* Branch navigation for regenerated responses */}
                {msg.branches > 1 && (
                  <ConversationBranch
                    current={msg.currentBranch}
                    total={msg.branches}
                    onPrevious={() => switchBranch(i, -1)}
                    onNext={() => switchBranch(i, 1)}
                  />
                )}

                <FeedbackBar.Root onFeedback={(v) => trackFeedback(i, v)}>
                  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp />
                  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown />
                  <FeedbackBar.Copy text={msg.content} />
                  <FeedbackBar.Regenerate onRegenerate={() => regenerate(i)} />
                </FeedbackBar.Root>
              </ChatThread.AssistantMessage>
            )
          )}
          <ChatThread.ScrollAnchor />
        </ChatThread.Messages>
      </ChatThread.Root>

      {tokenData && (
        <TokenUsage
          inputTokens={tokenData.input}
          outputTokens={tokenData.output}
          maxTokens={tokenData.max}
          cost={tokenData.cost}
        />
      )}

      <PromptBox.Root value={input} onValueChange={setInput} onSubmit={handleSubmit} isSubmitting={aiState !== "idle"}>
        <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Describe what you want to build..." minRows={2} />
        <PromptBox.Footer>
          <PromptBox.SubmitButton variant="icon-text" />
        </PromptBox.Footer>
      </PromptBox.Root>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

### Example 4: Image Generation App

Complete image generation flow with all states.

```tsx
import { ImageGen, PromptBox, StatusIndicator } from "@arc-lo/ui";
import { useState } from "react";

function ImageGenerationApp() {
  const [genState, setGenState] = useState("idle");
  const [imageUrl, setImageUrl] = useState(null);
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0);
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState("");

  async function handleGenerate(value) {
    setPrompt(value);
    setGenState("pending");

    try {
      setGenState("generating");

      const res = await fetch("/api/generate-image", {
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify({ prompt: value }),
      });

      // Simulate progress updates
      const reader = res.body.getReader();
      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;
        const data = JSON.parse(new TextDecoder().decode(value));
        setProgress(data.progress);
      }

      const result = await res.json();
      setImageUrl(result.url);
      setGenState("done");
    } catch (err) {
      setGenState("error");
    }
  }

  function handleRetry() {
    handleGenerate(prompt);
  }

  function handleDownload() {
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = imageUrl;
    a.download = "generated-image.png";
    a.click();
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-lg mx-auto p-6 space-y-6">
      <StatusIndicator
        state={genState === "generating" ? "streaming" : genState === "pending" ? "thinking" : "idle"}
        label={genState === "generating" ? "Generating..." : undefined}
      />

      <ImageGen.Root
        state={genState}
        src={imageUrl}
        alt={prompt}
        aspectRatio="1/1"
        prompt={prompt}
        blurReveal
        onRetry={handleRetry}
        onDownload={handleDownload}
      >
        <ImageGen.Placeholder />
        <ImageGen.Preview />
        <ImageGen.Progress progress={progress} />
        <ImageGen.Overlay label="Creating your image..." />
        <ImageGen.ErrorFallback message="Image generation failed. Please try again." />
        <ImageGen.Toolbar>
          <ImageGen.Download />
          <ImageGen.Retry />
        </ImageGen.Toolbar>
      </ImageGen.Root>

      <PromptBox.Root onSubmit={handleGenerate} isSubmitting={genState === "pending" || genState === "generating"}>
        <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Describe the image you want to create..." />
        <PromptBox.Suggestions
          suggestions={[
            "A cyberpunk city at night",
            "Oil painting of a sunset over mountains",
            "Minimalist logo for a tech startup",
          ]}
          onSelect={(s) => handleGenerate(s)}
        />
        <PromptBox.Footer>
          <PromptBox.SubmitButton variant="icon-text" loadingLabel="Generating..." />
        </PromptBox.Footer>
      </PromptBox.Root>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

### Example 5: Video Generation App

Complete video generation flow with all states and playback.

```tsx
import { VideoGen, PromptBox, StatusIndicator } from "@arc-lo/ui";
import { useState } from "react";

function VideoGenerationApp() {
  const [genState, setGenState] = useState("idle");
  const [videoUrl, setVideoUrl] = useState(null);
  const [thumbnailUrl, setThumbnailUrl] = useState(null);
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0);
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState("");
  const [stageLabel, setStageLabel] = useState("");

  async function handleGenerate(value) {
    setPrompt(value);
    setGenState("queued");
    setStageLabel("Queued...");

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/generate-video", {
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify({ prompt: value }),
      });

      const reader = res.body.getReader();
      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;
        const data = JSON.parse(new TextDecoder().decode(value));

        setGenState(data.state);
        setProgress(data.progress);

        if (data.state === "processing") setStageLabel("Processing prompt...");
        if (data.state === "rendering") setStageLabel("Rendering frames...");
        if (data.thumbnail) setThumbnailUrl(data.thumbnail);
      }

      const result = await res.json();
      setVideoUrl(result.url);
      setGenState("done");
    } catch (err) {
      setGenState("error");
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-6">
      <StatusIndicator
        state={
          genState === "queued" ? "thinking" :
          genState === "processing" || genState === "rendering" ? "streaming" :
          "idle"
        }
      />

      <VideoGen.Root
        state={genState}
        src={videoUrl}
        poster={thumbnailUrl}
        progress={progress}
        aspectRatio="16/9"
        duration={15}
        prompt={prompt}
        onRetry={() => handleGenerate(prompt)}
        onDownload={() => downloadVideo(videoUrl)}
        onPlay={() => trackPlay()}
      >
        <VideoGen.Placeholder />
        <VideoGen.Thumbnail />
        <VideoGen.Player autoPlay={false} loop muted />
        <VideoGen.Progress />
        <VideoGen.StageLabel label={stageLabel} />
        <VideoGen.PlayButton />
        <VideoGen.ErrorFallback message="Video generation failed. Please try again." />
        <VideoGen.Toolbar />
      </VideoGen.Root>

      <PromptBox.Root
        onSubmit={handleGenerate}
        isSubmitting={["queued", "processing", "rendering"].includes(genState)}
      >
        <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Describe the video you want to create..." />
        <PromptBox.Suggestions
          suggestions={[
            "A cat playing piano, cinematic",
            "Timelapse of a flower blooming",
            "Abstract geometric shapes morphing",
          ]}
          onSelect={(s) => handleGenerate(s)}
        />
        <PromptBox.Footer>
          <PromptBox.SubmitButton variant="icon-text" loadingLabel="Generating..." />
        </PromptBox.Footer>
      </PromptBox.Root>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Exported Types

```tsx
import type {
  // States
  StreamingState,        // "pending" | "streaming" | "done" | "interrupted" | "error" | "ratelimit"
  ConfidenceLevel,       // "high" | "medium" | "low" | "unknown"
  ChunkSize,             // "char" | "word" | "line"
  ImageGenState,         // "idle" | "pending" | "generating" | "done" | "error"
  VideoGenState,         // "idle" | "queued" | "processing" | "rendering" | "done" | "error"
  ThinkingState,         // "thinking" | "done" | "error"
  ToolCallStatus,        // "pending" | "running" | "success" | "error"
  StatusIndicatorState,  // "idle" | "thinking" | "streaming" | "tool-calling" | "error"
  MessageRole,           // "user" | "assistant" | "system"
  FileAttachmentType,    // "image" | "pdf" | "code" | "text" | "csv" | "other"

  // Props
  ImageGenRootProps,
  VideoGenRootProps,
  UseStreamingTextOptions,
  UseStreamingTextReturn,
  ConfidenceBadgeProps,
  CitationInlineProps,
  CitationGroupProps,
  RefusalCardProps,
  ThinkingBlockRootProps,
  ToolCallRootProps,
  MarkdownRendererProps,
  StatusIndicatorProps,
  TokenUsageProps,
  ModelSelectorProps,
  ModelOption,
  SourceCardProps,
  ChatThreadRootProps,
  ChatThreadMessageProps,
  FileAttachmentProps,
  CodeBlockProps,
  ConversationBranchProps,
  SuggestTopicsProps,
  TopicCardProps,
} from "@arc-lo/ui";
```
